description_long: This is a brown grocery bag with a loosely gathered top, tied with what appears to be a drawstring or a knot, giving it a slightly crumpled and soft appearance. The bag is opaque, with no visible branding, logos, or printed designs on its exterior. Its surface is matte and slightly textured, suggesting it is made from paper or a similar fibrous material. The bag's body is somewhat irregular, indicating it is partially filled and not rigid, with subtle creases and folds visible throughout. The opening at the top is cinched, but not fully closed, and the bag's overall shape is upright and sack-like. No groceries or items are visible inside or protruding from the bag.
description: A brown, matte grocery bag with a loosely tied top and a soft, crumpled appearance. The bag is partially full and unbranded, with no visible contents.
description_view_0: Front view of the brown grocery bag, showing the loosely tied top and the main body with visible creases.
description_view_1: Side view of the bag, appearing as a thin vertical line due to the bag's narrow profile from this angle.
description_view_2: Rear view of the grocery bag, similar to the front but with slightly different crease patterns and knot orientation.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing a thin vertical profile with minimal visible detail.
